content:
❓Introduction I use Arch btw.
Hii, I’m Appiah Bismark Also known online as Kwesi Larry(0xWizard),an Application Security Practitioner and Bug Hunter with experience in scripting, networking and linux administration. I Love breaking things (ethically), and sharing my knowledge, I love learning and mostly use my leisure time to do OSINT and Forensics Investigations and sometimes play chess.
💡 Skills Penetration Testing: OWASP Top 10, Web Application Testing,Wireless Network Testing. Programming: Python, Bash scripting. Investigations: OSINT Investigations, Forensics Investigations. Security Auditing: Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing, Report writing, Code Reviews,Bug Hunting. Miscellaneous: Docker, Git, Markdown. Tools: Metasploit, Burpsuite, OWASP Zap, NMAP,Wireshark,Nessus. 🏅 Achievements and Certifications TryHackMe Junior Penetration Tester certificate here
Certified APPSEC Practitioner Certficate Here
🎓 Education Senior High School: Opoku Ware School | GeneralArts(2020-2023) University: University of Mines and Technology | Bsc.Cybersecurity(2025-2028) Work Experience Cybersecurity Instructor at HIVE Consult (Remote- Feb, 2025 to Oct, 2025.) (i) Delivering engaging and effective penetration testing and Introduction to Linux courses to students, imparting practical skills and theoretical knowledge.
(ii) Developing curriculum content, practical labs, and assessments to ensure a well-rounded and impactful learning experience.
(iii) Providing mentorship and guidance to students, preparing them for real-world challenges in the field of cybersecurity.
Intern Penetation Tester at Hack Secure (Remote- April,2025 to May,2025) (i) Conducted penetration tests on web applications, networks, and systems to identify vulnerabilities and assess the overall security posture.
(ii) Provided detailed and actionable reports to clients, outlining vulnerabilities,potential exploits, and recommended mitigation strategies
📝 Write-ups Check out my latest security write-ups here.
